message:
fix(clippy): resolve vendored-feature clippy warnings

Fix 10 clippy errors surfaced with --features vendored:
- Box::pin large futures (35KB+) in mux_client batch/timeout and mux_pool
  render_changes_batch calls to reduce stack usage
- Allow single_range_in_vec_init in wezterm.rs chunked scrollback fetch
  (intentional Vec<Range> single element)
- Replace wildcard match with explicit CapturedSegmentKind::Delta in tailer
- Allow reversed_empty_ranges in test for descending range handling
- Use Err(e) with message instead of Err(_) in subscription timeout test
- Duration::from_secs(1) instead of Duration::from_millis(1000)
- Box::pin pool2.list_panes() in timeout test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
